title: For Lucid Motors Stock, Robotaxis Are Now the Whole Story
text: Lucid's partnership with Uber for robotaxis became increasingly central to the investment thesis. The company expanded its purchase commitment to at least 35,000 Lucid vehicles designed exclusively for Uber's robotaxi service. This strategic pivot shifted market focus from near-term profitability to the potential of autonomous vehicle applications. Analysts began factoring the Uber robotaxi opportunity into long-term valuation models. The 35,000 vehicle commitment provided visibility into future demand and revenue streams, though with significant execution risks. The robotaxi focus also signaled Lucid's acknowledgment that the luxury EV market alone would not support its growth ambitions and cash burn.
